# Experience API Style Evaluation – Cuentas por Pagar
# Generated by: GitHub Copilot – Claude Sonnet 4.6
schema_version: "1.0"
functionality_id: CXP-GHCopilot-Sonnet46
phase: backend-contract-design
generated_at: "2026-06-17"

evaluated_api: accounts-payable-exp-api
layer: experience
pattern: BFF (Backend for Frontend)

style_options_evaluated:
  - style: REST/JSON
    score: 9/10
    rationale: >
      Native browser compatibility, simple RBAC per-route enforcement,
      cache-friendly for GET operations, compatible with React Query/Axios.
      Uniform interface across all layers.
    recommendation: SELECTED

  - style: GraphQL
    score: 4/10
    rationale: >
      Per-field RBAC adds significant complexity for 3 roles.
      No multi-source federation benefit. Aggregation handled by BFF pattern.
    recommendation: REJECTED

  - style: gRPC
    score: 2/10
    rationale: >
      Not natively browser-compatible without transcoding proxy.
      Overkill for this scope.
    recommendation: REJECTED

selected_style: REST/JSON
interaction_style: rest
versioning: URI path versioning (/v1/)
error_format: "RFC 7807 Problem Details (application/problem+json)"
pagination: cursor-based
security_note: "JWT ****** OAuth2/OIDC; RBAC enforced per endpoint in middleware"

adr_reference: design/adr/tobe/ADR-CXP-001-rest-api-design.md
